_note: Buff definitions. stat-scaling entries use the buffer's own fightPropMap. Values at T8-T10.

Bennett.note: T10 burst: +62.2% of Bennett's base ATK as flat ATK

Furina.note: Fanfare ~200 avg stacks (C0 T10: 0.25%/stack, 300 max). Salon HP drain builds stacks fast. ~50% avg DMG during DPS window.

Zhongli.note: Jade Shield: -20% all element RES shred

Kazuha.note: A4: 0.04% elemental DMG per EM point for swirled element + VV -40% RES

Sucrose.note: A4: shares 20% of Sucrose's EM with team + VV -40% RES

Shenhe.note: A4: +15% Cryo DMG. Icy Quill (T10 press): ATK×45.6% flat per hit, ~10 stacks

Kujou Sara.note: T10 burst: +60% of Sara's base ATK to Electro characters

Gorou.note: 3-Geo: +25% DEF. C6 Geo chars get +40% Geo CRIT DMG (simplified as +15% geo DMG)

Faruzan.note: A4: +18% Anemo DMG. Burst: -30% Anemo RES

Yun Jin.note: T10 burst: adds 38.5% of Yun Jin's DEF as flat Normal Attack DMG per hit

Xilonen.note: Simplified: ~12% all RES shred + ~15% universal DMG from scrolls

Escoffier.note: A4: 55% Cryo+Hydro RES shred (4 Cryo/Hydro party members). C1: +60% Cryo CRIT DMG when 4 party members are Hydro/Cryo.

Ineffa.note: Burst A4: +6% of Ineffa's ATK as EM to team (20s). Moonsign: +0.7% LC base DMG per 100 ATK (cap 14%)

Columbina.note: Moonsign: +0.2% LC base DMG per 1000 HP (cap 7%). Burst: ~15% Lunar Reaction DMG bonus.

Lauma.note: Simplified: +150 EM to team + ~20% DMG buff

Citlali.note: Simplified: ~20% Cryo/Pyro RES shred + ~20% DMG buff

Rosaria.note: A4: shares 15% of Rosaria's CRIT rate with party

Thoma.note: Shield only, no significant DMG buffs

Mika.note: ATK SPD and healing, no DMG% buffs

Nahida.note: Simplified: +100 EM to Dendro/reaction teammates from A4

Raiden Shogun.note: Simplified: ~30% DMG buff from Resolve stacks (Eye of Stormy Judgment)

Yelan.note: A4: ramps 0→25% over 15s burst duration, applies ONLY to on-field character. Avg ~20% DMG.

Xingqiu.note: Simplified: minor DMG reduction buff and rain sword damage

Albedo.note: A4: +125 EM to all party members when on field

Fischl.note: Sub DPS, no significant stat buffs

Flins.note: Moonsign: +0.7% LC base DMG per 100 ATK (cap 14%). A1: +20% LC DMG when Moonsign Ascendant Gleam.
